Container.Name: monzo-receipts
Container.Overview: Automatically match Monzo bank transactions to Gmail receipts using OAuth. Connects to your Monzo account and Gmail inbox to pair purchases with their email receipts.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Monzo Receipts web interface.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Path to store the SQLite database and application data.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: The public URL of this app (e.g. https://receipts.yourdomain.com). Used for OAuth redirect URIs — must match exactly what is registered in Monzo and Google Cloud Console.

Config.Name: Monzo Client ID
Config.Description: OAuth Client ID from the Monzo Developer Portal (https://developers.monzo.com).

Config.Name: Monzo Client Secret
Config.Description: OAuth Client Secret from the Monzo Developer Portal.

Config.Name: Google Client ID
Config.Description: OAuth Client ID from Google Cloud Console. Required for Gmail receipt matching.

Config.Name: Google Client Secret
Config.Description: OAuth Client Secret from Google Cloud Console. Required for Gmail receipt matching.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: API key from OpenRouter (https://openrouter.ai). Required for AI-powered receipt matching.

Config.Name: OpenRouter Model
Config.Description: OpenRouter model to use for AI matching (e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini). Defaults to a sensible model if left blank.

Config.Name: Cookie Secure
Config.Description: Set to 'true' when serving over HTTPS (recommended for production). Set to 'false' for plain HTTP.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID the container process runs as.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID the container process runs as.
